Notice Of Motion To Strike The Amended Claim Of Quintosha Dennies Filed August 13, 2008
Off Calendar May-06-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Strike the Amended Claim of Quintosha Dennies Filed August 13, 2008. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

MOTION TO STRIKE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Pamela Underwood of the Office of the District Attorney (551.9544) for petitioner and moving party
Quintosha Dennis (no phone number given) respondent appearing in propria persona

Ms. Dennis appeared to state her case. The Court modified its ruling as follows: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE CLAIM OF QUINTOSHA DENNIS is granted with leave to amend. No opposition filed. Ms. Dennis may file an amended claim. Order signed in open Court. (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
